title: Everything is iPhone now
summary: Apple's iPhone remains the most influential consumer device ever created, fundamentally reshaping technology and user expectations for nearly 20 years. The device's success came from Apple's ability to transform technological limitations into elegant product design.
content:
This is part of our package about Apple's 50th anniversary, read more here.
The thing about the iPhone is that everyone knew it was going to be a big deal, and then it was an even bigger deal than that. Hell, it's still the biggest thing going.
It's hard to remember, but almost 20 years ago Apple's first iPhone really was that good. The trick that Steve Jobs and Jony Ive kept pulling off in that era was turning the limitations of the available technology into focal points of the products they made. The first iMac was built around a big, heavy CRT display - but Ive made the translucent case wrap around it, transforming the internals into a  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一切都是iPhone
zh.summary: 苹果的iPhone仍然是有史以来最具影响力的消费设备，在近20年来从根本上改变了技术和用户期望。该设备的成功来自苹果将技术限制转化为优雅产品设计的能力。

fr.title: Tout est iPhone maintenant
fr.summary: L'iPhone d'Apple reste le dispositif de consommation le plus influent jamais créé, restructurant fondamentalement la technologie et les attentes des utilisateurs depuis près de 20 ans. Le succès de cet appareil provient de la capacité d'Apple à transformer les limitations technologiques en une conception élégante.

de.title: Alles ist jetzt iPhone
de.summary: Apples iPhone bleibt das einflussreichste Verbrauchergerät, das je entwickelt wurde, und hat in den letzten 20 Jahren die Technologie und Benutzererwartungen grundlegend umgestaltet. Der Erfolg des Geräts entstand aus Apples Fähigkeit, technologische Einschränkungen in elegantes Produktdesign umzuwandeln.

es.title: Todo es iPhone ahora
es.summary: El iPhone de Apple sigue siendo el dispositivo de consumo más influyente jamás creado, redefiniendo fundamentalmente la tecnología y las expectativas de los usuarios durante casi 20 años. El éxito del dispositivo provino de la capacidad de Apple para transformar las limitaciones tecnológicas en un diseño de producto elegante.

title: April Fools’ Day 2026: the best and cringiest pranks
summary: Brands face a difficult choice on April Fools' Day: abstain entirely, actually follow through on announced products, be transparent it's a joke, or risk annoying customers with deceptive pranks. The Verge outlines why most April Fools' campaigns backfire.
content:
Welcome to the worst day on the internet! As Chaim Gartenberg pointed out years ago, brands and a holiday dedicated to hoaxes are rarely a winning combo. If you’re a company with any kind of social media, internet, or AI chatbot presence in 2026, you really, truly only have four options on April Fools’ Day:
Don’t do an April Fools’ joke. Put the time and energy into doing something productive that will materially benefit the world (or, less idealistically, your business) instead. Or just don’t do anything. Abstaining entirely would still be a net positive over the drain of resources and mental energy.
Do an April Fools’ “joke,” but actually follow through on your stunt. This is arguably not a prank since you’ve actually created a video game skin or a real product that people can buy — but it doesn’t really hurt anyone.
Do an April Fools’ joke, but be extremely clear from the start that this is a dumb joke and you have no intention of doing the thing that you are “humorously” pretending to do. Does this defeat the purpose of doing an April Fools’ joke because you’re not “fooling” anyone anymore? Absolutely. (Please see my first two points.)
Lie to your customers, successfully tricking them into believing you are making some product, rebranding, or service you are not. By doing so, you will almost certainly annoy everyone once your deceit is made plain for the extremely small gain of pointless PR. The aphorism goes that there is no such thing as bad publicity; the seemingly endless line of companies willing to make fools out of themselves has proven this false time and time again.
So far, we’ve seen some socks that even you can’t lose, Snapchat “Reals” took a shot at Instagram’s Xerox machine approach to product development, and the monitor accessory cats want the most.
If you see anything that particularly sticks out for good, bad, or just unusual reasons, send it to us.
April Fools’ 2026: Bass Magazine written by ChatGPT, sponsored by Suno.
			
April Fools’ 2026: Ya

zh.title: 2026年愚人节：最好和最令人尴尬的恶作剧
zh.summary: 品牌在愚人节面临艰难的选择：完全不参与、真正实现宣布的产品、透明地说明这是个笑话，或冒着令顾客烦恼的风险进行欺骗性恶作剧。《The Verge》概述了为什么大多数愚人节活动都适得其反。

fr.title: Jour des Blagues 2026 : les meilleures et les plus gênantes blagues
fr.summary: Les marques font face à un choix difficile le Jour des Blagues : s'abstenir complètement, concrétiser réellement les produits annoncés, être transparent que c'est une blague, ou risquer d'ennuyer les clients avec des blagues trompeuses. The Verge explique pourquoi la plupart des campagnes du Jour des Blagues échouent.

de.title: Aprilscherz 2026: die besten und peinlichsten Streiche
de.summary: Marken stehen am Aprilscherz vor einer schwierigen Entscheidung: völlig darauf verzichten, die angekündigten Produkte tatsächlich umzusetzen, transparent machen, dass es ein Scherz ist, oder das Risiko eingehen, Kunden mit täuschenden Streichen zu verärgern. The Verge erläutert, warum die meisten Aprilscherz-Kampagnen fehlschlagen.

The Verge explica por qué la mayoría de las campañas del Día de Inocentes fracasan.

title: Kia’s compact EV3 is coming to the US this year, with 320 miles of range
summary: Kia announced its compact electric SUV EV3 will arrive in the U.S. in late 2026 with standard and long-range configurations, offering 320 miles of range. The North American model features refined interior design and a new glossy black appearance option.
content:
2027 EV3 | Image: Kia	

At the New York International Auto Show on Wednesday, Kia announced that its compact electric SUV, the EV3, will be available in the US "in late 2026." The EV3 has been available overseas since 2024, when it launched in South Korea and Europe. The 2027 model coming to the US appears to have the same slightly boxy design as the current 2026 model, and it looks like Kia updated the center console to remove the much-mocked "chopping board" armrest in the original design. The North American version will also have a new glossy black "Nightfall" appearance package option. 
The EV3 will be available in standard and long-range configurations, offer …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 are now at their lowest price in months
summary: The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 bone conduction headphones are on sale for $139.99 (down $40) through April 7, their lowest price in months. The updated model addresses longstanding issues with bass quality and comfort while maintaining safety-conscious open-ear design.
content:
The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 deliver good bass for a pair of bone conduction headphones. | Image: The Verge	

As the days get warmer, it’s tempting to take your workouts outside. Bone conduction headphones let you listen while staying aware of your surroundings, making them ideal for runs, walks, and more. Through April 7th, Shokz is discounting several models during its spring sale, from the Shokz OpenFit Air Earbuds to the OpenDots One clip. The best deal, however, is on the Shokz OpenRun Pro 2, which are on sale for $139.99 ($40 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Shokz. That’s their best price since December and $15 shy of their all-time low.
Shokz OpenRun Pro 2

Where to Buy:

 $179.95 $139.95 at Amazon
 $179.95 $139.99 at REI
 $179.95 $139.99 at Best Buy

The OpenRun Pro 2 are Shokz’s best bone conduction headphones yet, addressing a long standing problem with the category: bass. The running-safe open-ear design often comes at the expense of clarity. The OpenRun Pro 2 tackles that problem with dedicated 18mm by 11mm air conduction drivers, which our reviewer Victoria Song found delivered noticeably richer bass and clearer sound than their predecessor.
She was also impressed by the fit. The updated design features thinner, more flexible ear hooks connected to a lightweight neckband, resulting in a more secure and comfortable feel than earlier models like the AfterShokz. Those older versions could feel too tight around the temples and uncomfortable with glasses, but here, the reduced clamping force and more flexible build make a difference.
In addition to delivering better sound, the OpenRun Pro 2 also offers improved battery life. They can last up to 12 hours on a single charge, and now recharge over USB-C. They also include AI-powered noise cancellation to improve call performance, though in our testing it wasn’t particularly effective. Still, if you’re looking for a comfortable, safety-minded pair of headphones, they’re still a solid option, particularly i

title: WhatsApp notifies hundreds of users who installed a fake app made by government spyware maker
summary: WhatsApp identified approximately 200 users who were deceived into installing Italian-made spyware disguised as the legitimate WhatsApp app. Meta's communication platform notified affected users of the security threat.
content: The Meta-owned company said it identified around 200 users who were tricked into installing a fake version of WhatsApp that was actually Italian-made spyware.

zh.title: WhatsApp通知安装了由政府间谍软件制造商制作的假应用程序的数百用户
zh.summary: WhatsApp确定了约200名用户被欺骗安装了伪装成合法WhatsApp应用程序的意大利制造的间谍软件。Meta的通信平台通知了受影响用户关于安全威胁。

fr.title: WhatsApp notifie des centaines d'utilisateurs qui ont installé une fausse application créée par un fabricant de logiciels espions gouvernementaux
fr.summary: WhatsApp a identifié environ 200 utilisateurs qui ont été trompés en installant un logiciel espion fabriqué en Italie déguisé en application WhatsApp légitime. La plateforme de communication de Meta a notifié les utilisateurs affectés de la menace de sécurité.

de.title: WhatsApp benachrichtigt Hunderte von Benutzern, die eine gefälschte App installiert haben, die von einem staatlichen Spyware-Hersteller entwickelt wurde
de.summary: WhatsApp identifizierte etwa 200 Benutzer, die getäuscht wurden und italienische Spyware installierten, die als legitime WhatsApp-App getarnt ist. Metas Kommunikationsplattform benachrichtigte betroffene Benutzer über die Sicherheitsbedrohung.

es.title: WhatsApp notifica a cientos de usuarios que instalaron una aplicación falsa hecha por un fabricante de software espía del gobierno
es.summary: WhatsApp identificó aproximadamente 200 usuarios que fueron engañados para instalar software espía fabricado en Italia disfrazado como la aplicación legítima de WhatsApp. La plataforma de comunicación de Meta notificó a los usuarios afectados sobre la amenaza de seguridad.

title: I tested a living room full of cheap Ikea speakers against Sonos and Bose
summary: Ikea's $10 Kallsup Bluetooth speaker delivers surprising sound quality and colorful design for its price point, with the bonus feature of connecting up to 100 units together. While not high-end, it offers strong value for casual listeners.
content:
Ikea's $10 Kallsup Bluetooth speaker is fun and colorful and sounds better than its price suggests. It's not mind-blowing (it is a $10 speaker, after all), and there are no features to speak of, other than the ability to connect up to 100 of them together, but at that price, I don't really care. They're a quick addition if I need a bit more color and sound on my desk or in my son's room.
The Kallsup is about as simple as a Bluetooth speaker can get. It's a 2.75-inch plastic cube enclosure with four short feet on the bottom and a single speaker inside, and it's available in pink, white, and yellow green. There are two buttons and a small LED …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我测试了一间充满廉价宜家扬声器的客厅，与Sonos和Bose进行了对比
zh.summary: Ikea的10美元Kallsup蓝牙扬声器以其价格点提供了令人惊讶的音质和丰富多彩的设计，额外功能是可以连接最多100个单元。虽然不是高端产品，但它为休闲听众提供了强大的价值。

fr.title: J'ai testé un salon plein de haut-parleurs Ikea bon marché contre Sonos et Bose
fr.summary: Le haut-parleur Bluetooth Kallsup d'Ikea à 10 dollars offre une qualité sonore surprenante et un design coloré pour son point de prix, avec la fonction bonus de connecter jusqu'à 100 unités ensemble. Bien que non haut de gamme, il offre une excellente valeur pour les auditeurs occasionnels.

de.title: Ich habe ein Wohnzimmer voller günstiger Ikea-Lautsprecher gegen Sonos und Bose getestet
de.summary: Der Bluetooth-Lautsprecher Kallsup von Ikea für 10 Dollar bietet überraschend gute Klangqualität und farbenfrohe Gestaltung zu seinem Preis, mit der zusätzlichen Funktion, bis zu 100 Einheiten zusammenzuschließen. Obwohl es nicht hochwertig ist, bietet es großartiges Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis für gelegentliche Hörer.

es.title: Probé una sala de estar llena de altavoces baratos de Ikea contra Sonos y Bose
es.summary: El altavoz Bluetooth Kallsup de Ikea de $10 ofrece una calidad de sonido sorprendente y un diseño colorido por su punto de precio, con la función adicional de conectar hasta 100 unidades juntas. Si bien no es de gama alta, ofrece un gran valor para oyentes ocasionales.

title: Snapchat’s ‘Reals’ joke mocks Instagram’s many ripoffs
summary: Snapchat announced on April Fools' Day that it would rename its Spotlight shortform video feed to 'Reals,' mocking Instagram's history of copying Snapchat's features. The joke highlights how Instagram has replicated Snapchat's Stories and vertical video concepts.
content:
It's April Fools' Day, and Snap is using the occasion to "announce" that it's switching the name of Snapchat's Spotlight feed, the app's Instagram Reels-like feed of shortform vertical videos, to "Reals." 
In a video featuring co-founder and CEO Evan Spiegel, Snap also includes a description of "Reals" as a place where "real people share real moments. Really." Spiegel adds that "People feel free to be their full selves and to keep it Real on Snapchat" (In the video's captions, Snap capitalized "Real").
Spiegel also used the video to remind users about its ephemeral Stories format - which, like TikTok's vertical video feed, Instagram ripped …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snapchat的"Reals"玩笑嘲笑了Instagram的众多模仿
zh.summary: Snapchat在愚人节宣布，将其Spotlight短视频源重命名为"Reals"，嘲笑Instagram长期以来复制Snapchat功能的历史。这个笑话突出了Instagram如何复制了Snapchat的Stories和竖视频概念。

fr.title: La blague 'Reals' de Snapchat se moque des nombreux plagiums d'Instagram
fr.summary: Snapchat a annoncé le jour des Poissons d'avril qu'il renommerait son flux vidéo court Spotlight en 'Reals', se moquant de l'histoire d'Instagram de copier les fonctionnalités de Snapchat. La blague met en évidence comment Instagram a reproduit les concepts de Stories et de vidéos verticales de Snapchat.

de.title: Snapchats 'Reals'-Witz verspottet Instagrams viele Kopien
de.summary: Snapchat kündigte am 1. April an, seinen Spotlight-Kurzvideokanal in 'Reals' umzubenennen, was sich über Instagrams Geschichte lustig macht, Snapchat-Funktionen zu kopieren. Der Witz hebt hervor, wie Instagram Snapchats Storys- und vertikale Videokonzepte repliziert hat.

es.title: La broma de 'Reals' de Snapchat se burla de los muchos plagios de Instagram
es.summary: Snapchat anunció el Día de Inocentes que renombraría su feed de video corto Spotlight a 'Reals', burlándose del historial de Instagram de copiar características de Snapchat. La broma destaca cómo Instagram ha replicado los conceptos de Historias y videos verticales de Snapchat.

title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
summary: Cognichip raised $60 million to develop AI systems that design computer chips, claiming their approach could reduce development costs by 75% and timelines by more than 50%. The startup aims to accelerate semiconductor innovation for AI applications.
content: The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

zh.title: Cognichip想让AI设计为AI提供动力的芯片，并筹集了6000万美元来尝试
zh.summary: Cognichip筹集了6000万美元来开发设计计算机芯片的AI系统，声称他们的方法可以将开发成本降低75%，时间表缩短50%以上。这家初创公司旨在加速AI应用的半导体创新。

fr.title: Cognichip veut que l'IA conçoive les puces qui alimentent l'IA, et vient de lever 60 millions de dollars pour essayer
fr.summary: Cognichip a levé 60 millions de dollars pour développer des systèmes d'IA qui conçoivent des puces informatiques, affirmant que leur approche pourrait réduire les coûts de développement de 75% et les délais de plus de 50%. La startup vise à accélérer l'innovation des semi-conducteurs pour les applications d'IA.

de.title: Cognichip möchte, dass KI die Chips entwirft, die KI antreiben, und hat gerade 60 Millionen Dollar gesammelt, um es zu versuchen
de.summary: Cognichip hat 60 Millionen Dollar aufgebracht, um KI-Systeme zu entwickeln, die Computerchips entwerfen, und behauptet, dass ihr Ansatz die Entwicklungskosten um 75% und die Zeitleisten um mehr als 50% reduzieren könnte. Das Startup zielt darauf ab, die Halbleiterinnovation für KI-Anwendungen zu beschleunigen.

es.title: Cognichip quiere que la IA diseñe los chips que impulsan la IA, y acaba de recaudar $60M para intentarlo
es.summary: Cognichip recaudó $60 millones para desarrollar sistemas de IA que diseñen chips informáticos, afirmando que su enfoque podría reducir los costos de desarrollo en un 75% y los plazos en más del 50%. La startup tiene como objetivo acelerar la innovación de semiconductores para aplicaciones de IA.

title: The Trump administration’s antitrust honeymoon is over
summary: The Trump administration's Department of Justice signals a more aggressive antitrust enforcement stance after months of perceived leniency toward corporate interests. Acting antitrust chief Omeed Assefi outlined the agency's commitment to challenging corporate consolidation.
content:
"It's not personal, Sonny, it's strictly business."
That quote was first delivered by mob boss Michael Corleone in The Godfather, but last Monday, it became the title of a speech by the Justice Department's acting antitrust chief Omeed Assefi. At a George Washington University event co-hosted with the publication MLex, Assefi described an agency firing on all cylinders, standing strong against bad corporate actors when warranted, but being open to reasonable negotiation to reach the strongest possible result.
Implicitly, Assefi was responding to months of complaints that his agency was bowing to corporate lobbyists and striking weak settle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普政府的反垄断蜜月期结束
zh.summary: 特朗普政府司法部表示将采取更激进的反垄断执法立场，结束了数个月来对企业利益的宽松态度。代理反垄断负责人欧米德·阿塞菲阐述了该机构挑战企业合并的承诺。

fr.title: La lune de miel antitrust de l'administration Trump est terminée
fr.summary: Le ministère de la Justice de l'administration Trump signale une position d'application antitrust plus agressive après des mois de clémence envers les intérêts des entreprises. Le chef antitrust par intérim Omeed Assefi a exposé l'engagement de l'agence à contester la consolidation des entreprises.

de.title: Honeymoon-Phase der Trump-Administration beim Kartellrecht ist vorbei
de.summary: Das Justizministerium der Trump-Administration signalisiert eine aggressivere Kartellverfolgung nach Monaten wahrgenommener Nachsicht gegenüber Unternehmensinteressen. Der kommissarische Kartellchef Omeed Assefi erläuterte das Engagement der Behörde zur Anfechtung der Unternehmenskonsolidierung.

es.title: Se acabó la luna de miel antimonopolio de la administración Trump
es.summary: El Departamento de Justicia de la administración Trump señala una postura de aplicación antimonopolio más agresiva después de meses de aparente indulgencia hacia los intereses corporativos. El jefe antimonopolio interino Omeed Assefi explicó el compromiso de la agencia de desafiar la consolidación corporativa.

title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO in mega listing potentially valued at $1.75 trillion, report says
summary: SpaceX confidentially filed for an initial public offering with the SEC in what could become the largest IPO in history, with reports valuing the company at up to $1.75 trillion. The filing, internally codenamed 'Project Apex,' is backed by 21 investment banks.
content: The company has also lined up an unusually large number of 21 banks to manage the mega IPO, internally codenamed “Project Apex."

zh.title: SpaceX秘密申请IPO，估值可能达1.75万亿美元
zh.summary: SpaceX向美国证券交易委员会秘密申请首次公开募股，可能成为历史上规模最大的IPO，估值最高达1.75万亿美元。该申请内部代号为"顶点计划"，由21家投资银行支持。

fr.title: SpaceX dépose confidentiellement une demande d'IPO dans une méga-cotation potentiellement valorisée à 1,75 billion de dollars
fr.summary: SpaceX a confidentielement déposé une demande d'offre publique initiale auprès de la SEC dans ce qui pourrait devenir la plus grande IPO de l'histoire, avec une valorisation pouvant atteindre 1,75 billion de dollars. Le dossier, portant le nom de code interne « Project Apex », est soutenu par 21 banques d'investissement.

de.title: SpaceX reicht vertraulich IPO-Antrag für potenziell 1,75 Billionen Dollar wertiges Mega-Listing ein
de.summary: SpaceX hat vertraulich einen Antrag auf eine Aktienerstemission bei der SEC eingereicht, der zum größten Börsengang der Geschichte werden könnte, mit einer Bewertung von bis zu 1,75 Billionen Dollar. Der Antrag mit dem internen Codenamen "Project Apex" wird von 21 Investmentbanken unterstützt.

La presentación, con el nombre de código interno "Proyecto Apex", está respaldada por 21 bancos de inversión.

title: SpaceX reportedly files for IPO but it’s keeping the numbers secret (for now)
summary: SpaceX filed for its IPO with the SEC, but the filing remains confidential under SEC rules allowing secrecy until 15 days before the company begins investor roadshows. Details on Starlink revenue, Starship expenses, and xAI integration remain undisclosed.
content:
The world’s first trillionaire? | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

What's expected to be the biggest IPO in human history is reportedly underway. SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering with the Securities and Exchange Commission, according to a report from Bloomberg. But for now, the filing is confidential.
Under SEC rules, SpaceX isn't required to make its S-1 prospectus public until 15 days before it begins pitching to investors on its roadshow. That means we'll have to wait for details like Starlink's subscriber revenue, the cash burn rate of the Starship program, and how the recently absorbed xAI fits into the corporate structure.
Currently, the company is rumored to be targeting a staggering …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SpaceX据报道申请IPO但目前保密数据
zh.summary: SpaceX向美国证券交易委员会申请了IPO，但根据美国证券交易委员会允许保密的规则，该申请在公司开始投资者路演前15天内保持机密。关于Starlink收入、Starship支出和xAI整合的细节仍未披露。

fr.title: SpaceX déposerait une demande d'IPO mais garde les chiffres secrets (pour l'instant)
fr.summary: SpaceX a déposé sa demande d'IPO auprès de la SEC, mais le dossier reste confidentiel selon les règles de la SEC permettant le secret jusqu'à 15 jours avant le début des présentations aux investisseurs de l'entreprise. Les détails concernant les revenus de Starlink, les dépenses de Starship et l'intégration de xAI restent non divulgués.

Details zu Starlinks Einnahmen, Starships Ausgaben und xAI-Integration bleiben nicht offengelegt.

es.summary: SpaceX presentó su solicitud de IPO a la SEC, pero la presentación sigue siendo confidencial conforme a las reglas de la SEC que permiten el secreto hasta 15 días antes de que la empresa comience las presentaciones a inversores. Los detalles sobre los ingresos de Starlink, los gastos de Starship y la integración de xAI siguen sin revelarse.

title: These Raspberry Pi price hikes are no joke
summary: Raspberry Pi is raising prices on 16 models by $11.25 to $150 due to ongoing RAM shortages, with the 16GB Pi 5 jumping $100. CEO Eben Upton confirmed the increases are temporary and will be reversed once supply chain conditions improve.
content:
As of today, the price of the 16GB version of the Raspberry Pi 5 is going up by $100, a price bump that's almost as much as the original $120 price tag. Driven by the ongoing RAM shortage, Raspberry Pi is raising prices on over a dozen of its bare-bones computers, after previous increases in December and February. The increases range from $11.25 to $150. 
In a blog post announcing the price increases, Raspberry Pi CEO Eben Upton reiterated that they won't be permanent, stating, "The circumstances in which we find ourselves are challenging, but in the future they will abate. When they do, we will reverse our price increases, and until they d …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这些树莓派价格上涨不是开玩笑
zh.summary: 由于持续的RAM短缺，树莓派将16个型号的价格上调$11.25到$150不等，其中16GB Pi 5上涨$100。首席执行官Eben Upton确认这些提价是暂时的，一旦供应链条件改善将被撤销。

fr.title: Ces augmentations de prix Raspberry Pi ne sont pas une blague

Le PDG Eben Upton a confirmé que les augmentations sont temporaires et seront annulées une fois que les conditions de la chaîne d'approvisionnement s'amélioreront.

de.title: Diese Raspberry Pi-Preiserhöhungen sind kein Witz

CEO Eben Upton bestätigte, dass die Erhöhungen vorübergehend sind und rückgängig gemacht werden, sobald sich die Bedingungen der Lieferkette verbessern.

El CEO Eben Upton confirmó que los aumentos son temporales y se revertirán una vez que mejoren las condiciones de la cadena de suministro.

title: Baidu’s robotaxis froze in traffic, creating chaos
summary: Baidu's Apollo Go robotaxis froze in Wuhan on Tuesday, trapping passengers and causing multiple traffic accidents across the city. Police confirmed the outages were caused by a system failure, raising concerns about the reliability of autonomous vehicles in real-world conditions.
content:
A Baidu Apollo robotaxi in Wuhan, China. | Image: Bloomberg via Getty Images	

Numerous robotaxis operated by Chinese tech giant Baidu froze in a major city on Tuesday, reportedly trapping passengers inside, stranding them on highways, and causing at least one accident in snarled traffic. 
Police in Wuhan confirmed receiving multiple reports of Baidu's Apollo Go robotaxis stopping in the middle of streets and being unable to move. Police said no injuries have been reported and that preliminary investigations suggest an unspecified "system failure" is responsible for the outage. 


NEW: Dozens of robotaxis by Baidu stopped on the road in Wuhan, causing crashes on highways and trapping passengers in the cars-some for mo …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 百度自动驾驶出租车在交通中冻结，造成混乱
zh.summary: 百度Apollo Go自动驾驶出租车周二在武汉冻结，困住乘客并导致全城多起交通事故。警方证实停机是由系统故障引起的，引发了人们对自动驾驶车辆在真实世界条件下可靠性的担忧。

fr.title: Les robotaxis de Baidu se sont figés dans le trafic, créant du chaos

La police a confirmé que les pannes étaient causées par une défaillance du système, soulevant des préoccupations concernant la fiabilité des véhicules autonomes dans les conditions réelles.

de.title: Baidus Robotaxis blieben im Verkehr stecken und verursachten Chaos

Die Polizei bestätigte, dass die Ausfälle durch einen Systemfehler verursacht wurden, was Bedenken hinsichtlich der Zuverlässigkeit autonomer Fahrzeuge unter realen Bedingungen aufwirft.

es.title: Los robotaxis de Baidu se congelaron en el tráfico, creando caos
es.summary: Los robotaxis Apollo Go de Baidu se congelaron en Wuhan el martes, atrapando a los pasajeros y causando múltiples accidentes de tráfico en toda la ciudad. La policía confirmó que los apagones fueron causados por una falla del sistema, lo que genera preocupaciones sobre la confiabilidad de los vehículos autónomos en condiciones del mundo real.

title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open-source LiteLLM project
summary: Mercor, an AI recruiting startup, confirmed a cyberattack in which an extortion crew stole company data. The breach was tied to a compromise of the open-source LiteLLM project, highlighting risks in shared infrastructure dependencies.
content: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

zh.title: Mercor称其遭遇与开源LiteLLM项目泄露相关的网络攻击
zh.summary: AI招聘初创公司Mercor证实遭遇网络攻击，勒索团伙盗取了公司数据。此次泄露与开源LiteLLM项目的安全漏洞有关，突出了共享基础设施依赖项的风险。

fr.title: Mercor affirme avoir subi une cyberattaque liée à la compromission du projet open-source LiteLLM
fr.summary: Mercor, une startup de recrutement par IA, a confirmé une cyberattaque au cours de laquelle un groupe d'extorsion a volé les données de l'entreprise. La violation était liée à une compromission du projet open-source LiteLLM, mettant en évidence les risques des dépendances d'infrastructure partagée.

de.title: Mercor sagt, es wurde von einem Cyberangriff getroffen, der mit einer Kompromittierung des Open-Source-Projekts LiteLLM verbunden ist
de.summary: Mercor, ein KI-Recruiting-Startup, bestätigte einen Cyberangriff, bei dem ein Erpressungsteam Unternehmensdaten gestohlen hat. Der Verstoß war mit einer Kompromittierung des Open-Source-Projekts LiteLLM verbunden und verdeutlicht die Risiken von gemeinsamen Infrastruktur-Abhängigkeiten.

es.title: Mercor dice que fue víctima de un ciberataque vinculado al compromiso del proyecto de código abierto LiteLLM
es.summary: Mercor, una startup de reclutamiento de IA, confirmó un ciberataque en el que una banda de extorsión robó datos de la empresa. La filtración estaba vinculada a un compromiso del proyecto de código abierto LiteLLM, destacando los riesgos de las dependencias de infraestructura compartida.

title: NASA is leading the way to the Moon, but the military won't be far behind
summary: NASA is leading the race to return humans to the Moon, but the U.S. military is positioning itself to protect American interests in lunar space. The strategic competition mirrors Cold War-era space dynamics as nations prepare for potential conflicts beyond Earth.
content: "I just don't want to get caught flat-footed when we start to have to protect US interests out there."

zh.title: NASA领导月球竞赛，但军方紧随其后
zh.summary: NASA正在领导人类重返月球的竞赛，但美国军方正在自我定位以保护美国在月球空间的利益。这种战略竞争反映了冷战时期的太空动态，随着各国为可能超越地球的冲突做准备。

fr.title: La NASA mène le chemin vers la Lune, mais l'armée ne sera pas loin derrière
fr.summary: La NASA mène la course pour ramener les humains sur la Lune, mais l'armée américaine se positionne pour protéger les intérêts américains dans l'espace lunaire. La compétition stratégique reflète la dynamique spatiale de l'époque de la Guerre froide alors que les nations se préparent à des conflits potentiels au-delà de la Terre.

de.title: Die NASA führt den Weg zum Mond an, aber das Militär wird nicht weit dahinter sein
de.summary: Die NASA führt das Rennen an, um Menschen zum Mond zurückzubringen, aber das US-amerikanische Militär positioniert sich, um amerikanische Interessen im Weltraum um den Mond zu schützen. Der strategische Wettbewerb spiegelt die Weltraum-Dynamiken des Kalten Krieges wider, während sich Nationen auf mögliche Konflikte jenseits der Erde vorbereiten.

es.title: La NASA lidera el camino hacia la Luna, pero el ejército no estará lejos atrás
es.summary: La NASA encabeza la carrera para llevar a los humanos a la Luna, pero el ejército estadounidense se está posicionando para proteger los intereses estadounidenses en el espacio lunar. La competencia estratégica refleja la dinámica espacial de la era de la Guerra Fría, mientras que las naciones se preparan para posibles conflictos más allá de la Tierra.

title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
summary: Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026 offers discounts across consumer electronics, smart home devices, and outdoor gear, ending tonight. Major retailers like Best Buy and Walmart are matching prices, and most deals are available without Prime membership.
content:
If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight. We’re still highlighting the best that the sale has to offer, including the many so-called “doorbuster” deals that will appear throughout the remainder of the seasonal shopping event.
Despite the fact that the sale will end in a few short hours, you can find deals on all sorts of consumer tech, from personal audio and home theater upgrades to steep discounts on video games, mobile accessories, and various doo-dads for tinkerers. Given that the sale coincides with the arrival of spring, you can also find deals on plenty of outdoor-friendly gear, including portable Bluetooth speakers, open-style earbuds, and more.
Amazon’s annual spring sale doesn’t require a Prime membership to participate in, either. Most of the deals are available to everyone, with big-name retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Target matching Amazon’s pricing in many instances. There are sure to be some Prime-exclusive sales in the mix, so regardless of where you plan to shop, we’ve got you covered.
The AirPods Pro 3 are nearly matching their best-ever price for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
			
Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale
			
You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27

Sony’s WH-1000XM5 headphones are a whopping 39 percent off
			
Belkin’s battery-equipped Switch 2 case is more than 35 percent off
